title: Finite Naive Bayes Classifier Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Naive Bayes bad posterior QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational Naive Bayes replay computes posterior 9/13 for a binary-feature observation, while a malformed row claims 2/3, isolating a compact scalar Farkas conflict.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite classifier rows only when they add distinct conditional-independence, smoothing, threshold, multiclass, calibration, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep statistical generalization and floating-point classifier claims in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed finite training rows, binary feature counts, Laplace-smoothed likelihoods, class scores, posterior probabilities, and classifier decision as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false posterior claim through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting posterior equation.
Expose the pack through probability, statistics, finite classifier, exact-vs-floating, and learner-query surfaces.
Keep conditional-independence validity, Bayes optimality, calibration, statistical consistency, model selection, and floating-point classifier behavior marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
